PVS1._note: Cardiomyopathy VCEP: PVS1 NOT applicable to MYH7 — LoF is not a known disease mechanism

BS1._note: MYH7 BS1 = 0.00004; reflects sarcomere gene low background

PP2._note: PP2 applicable for MYH7 (low rate of benign missense per Walsh 2017)

_notes: MYH7 is canonical example of where generic PVS1 over-calls — VCEP override is essential.
